stemHtml: Which of the following four-digit codes should a pilot keep in the working memory?

options.a: During approach or take-off, the emergency transponder code.
options.b: The transponder code for radio communication failure and unlawful interference.
options.c: The last transponder code provided by ATC which is not set on the transponder.
options.d: The last transponder code provided by ATC and set on the transponder.
